nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for mundane tasks

nodes.grounding_span: I used AI to summarize some of those reports so I could save myself the time of reading them line by line

nodes.label: Efficiency and reduced mental load
nodes.grounding_span: I like to use AI to improve efficiency and to lighten my mental load

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and control
nodes.grounding_span: I also like to still feel in control of my work

nodes.label: Accuracy and trustworthiness in work
nodes.grounding_span: due to the concern of AI making errors

nodes.label: Personal fulfillment through creative engagement
nodes.grounding_span: If it's something that I'm personally passionate about then I do it myself

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for efficiency gains
nodes.grounding_span: it saved me hours of reading and let me get to more important work

nodes.label: Preference for human control in creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If it's something that I'm personally passionate about then I do it myself

nodes.grounding_span: detailed things like financial reports I do myself due to the concern of AI making errors

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI use if accuracy improves
nodes.grounding_span: if accuracy became less of a concern then it could maybe become more helpful with detailed/financial related tasks

nodes.label: Iterative collaborative refinement — works with AI through multiple rounds
nodes.grounding_span: I'll work with the AI until we've created the final product that I need

nodes.label: Domain-based task allocation — distinguishes mundane vs. passionate tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If it's mundane then I might get AI to help me. If it's something that I'm personally passionate about then I do it myself
